title: BLADEZ Hot Wheels Licensed Sticker Craft Activity Set Includes Card Cars, Stickers, Pens and Colouring Sheets, for Kids Art and Creative Play Toyz Age 3+
features: LOADS OF STICKERS - This Hot Wheels Sticker Craft Activity Set includes 40 pieces featuring fun car characters, items, and scenes. These vibrant kids stickers provide endless opportunities for creative decoration.

HOURS OF CREATIVE FUN - Kids can spend hours customising the included mini card scene and colouring in character and landscape sheets with the 3 coloured pens. This Hotwheels set is perfect for fostering imagination and creativity.

PORTABLE PASTIME - Compact and easy to carry, this set is perfect for keeping young fans entertained anywhere. With sticker sheets, strips, and small colouring pages, it fits easily into any bag, making it an ideal sticker pack for travel.

ENDLESS ADVENTURES - Whether decorating notebooks, devices, or crafting their own fun Hot Wheels worlds, this set fuels endless creative play. It's an affordable and versatile sticker pack that encourages imaginative storytelling.

PERFECT FOR PARTIES - These stickers for party bags make great additions to any celebration. The childrens stickers are sure to delight, making them a perfect gift or party favor that adds fun and excitement to any event.
description: Product Description Get creative with this Hot Wheels Sticker Activity set! Add stickers to the easy to make card Hot Wheels cars, customise with stickers and the felt tip pens included, plus much more to colour and sticker! Safety Warning Suitable for children 3 years and above
